reviews.review_description: Has so much potential but the ai is just awful its so frustrating how bad they are also the fact that you cant change your starting position is the most irritating thing about the bot if these issues are fixed which seem to be easy fixes then this will be a very solid game
Tons of toxic people good game and has potential but needs updates and reporting systems and devs pls fix this and the game will be AMAZING

reviews.review_title: Bots have no clue what they are doing
reviews.review_description: The racing mode is terrible, the bots have no clue what’s going on around them, they slam into the player when trying to overtake, and all they do is mindlessly follow the racing line. Secondly, the penalty system is trash, the player gets a penalty for hitting the ai, but they don’t get one for hitting the player. I only recommend this game if you want to do time trails, or online (dead) or if you want to get mad at the game and restart your race 10 times.

reviews.review_title: Amazing, but fix the discord invite link
reviews.review_description: This game is an amazing game. But what they need to do is fix the discord. Invite, because I've been trying to join it for the past 3 days. And every time I go to it does not work. Other than that, the game is amazing. Physics are good. The turning is amazing, but they do also kinda need to fix the crash physics. So like if you crash into a wall, then you lose a tire or all your tire. S, and if you flip, if you manage to slip, then you like restart from the beginning, I think that would be kind of cool.
Solid game but needs carrer mode and a better way to level up like maybe having it so when you win a race with like specific settings you get xp. It also needs more.tracks pls.
Anyplans to add more tracks like miami , zandvoort , Melbourne , Singapore etc Possibly interactive wheel buttons and dials etc on the steering wheel?

The game is fun, but the AI cars are horrible worse than Lance Stroll. They have no situational awareness. For example, they’ll slow down to half the racing speed and stay in the middle of the track, causing a five-car pile-up. They’ll also smash into you while trying to overtake, and for some reason you get the 10-second time penalty for their mistake.

Speaking of penalties, the penalty system is absolute trash. Half the time, it’s either the AI or someone else at fault, but you still get penalized. For example, if the AI runs you off the track, you’ll get a 10-second collision penalty and a 10-second track-cutting penalty.

Game is fun but could really use a career mode because playing with ai for little to no reason gets boring after a while. 

PS: should add Interlagos😁🇧🇷

reviews.review_title: Bad for racing good for spinning
reviews.review_description: To put it simply even with TCS on you will spin out if you try to fix a mistake or even have the ai crash into u like Latifi 2021 and yet you will get the penalty for it. If you lose control it takes ages to get back on track and you will still recieve a penalty. It seems stupid. Its also only fun to crash into the AI as the handling even on the good cars SUCK you will spin out atleast 90% of the time

This game is good but needs work like the cars arent very responsive dont  accelerate quick enough they have no downforce  and we need more tracks than this the lap times arent realistic at all like 25 seconds off is crazy slow. The tyres arent any different in grip levels

we CAN do better come on devs

I gave this five stars because it’s a very good game but fix the penalties a bit racer would hit me in the side and I would get the penalty. I would go off the track because there was a big wreck and I would get a track cut.and the ai doesn’t even have to pit so what the point of tire ware when your the only one pitting and when I would pit I would get in last because none of the bot have to pit.I really do live your game but add multiplayer bot races ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️￼

reviews.review_title: Don’t know if I played a worse game
reviews.review_description: Crazy unrealistic, if the bots difficulty is under 50, than they suck and only dive bomb to over take (which they over shoot every time), and if they’re over 50 they will just follow their programmed  race line or crash into you or the wall trying to. The game is also abandoned, hasn’t been updated for who knows the last time. Barely anyone’s ever in anymore too so online isn’t too useful. I do not suggest paying for this but go ahead if you want

The game is great overall, I think the only thing it struggles with is updates, they update MotoX all the time but I think if they start rolling out updates for this game like every 2 weeks, it would be the best game in gaming history, would recommend if you wanna simulate F1 with just a quest.

The control are ok, but the tracks are really basic, I don't care about the track names, but I need to drive the REAL track layout !  It has the potential to be really good but the devs needs to work on it. For the moment, i can't rate better than 3 stars... I will upgrade it if i see improvmemts in the future.
I hate those mf dancing in the middle of the road on highway

This game is amazing, after the recent updates and the dev’s return, this game has become, what I believe to be the best VR racing game. And not to mention the price. 8 dollars is an absolute bargain for a game this quality. The tracks are clean and good looking, I love the car liveries for the different teams, and I am exploding with excitement waiting for the next update. 

Some things that I think would be cool in the future is to add an animation of the DRS opening and closing in the multiplayer and bot racing modes. Plus a story mode/ career mode would be super cool. you could treat it like the player is a rookie driver trying to make his way through the F1 season with different choices and and ways you could determine your season outcome. 

In conclusion, this is an amazing game with so much potential.  I’d give it 50 stars if I could. It is more than worth the 8 dollars. 👏👏👏  Great job, keep it up man.

Amazing game probably number 1 I love it the community is nice and funny physics are good graphics and pretty good but the only thing it lacks is tracks other then that this is amazing my favorite tracks are Monaco and red fire ring the rest are also cool my favorite vr game
No point buying now unless they actually update the game.

Good community 
Love it 
Has lots of potential however needs more tracks

reviews.review_title: It’s good, just needs some more things.
reviews.review_description:
Had recently gotten the game and thought it was great, but just needed some things, which are listed below…
————————————————————————
General:
1. Rolling (over time) / stationary weather (drizzle, cloudy, light rain, heavy rain, cold/hot, dry/damp)
2. More tyre compounds (Hypersoft, Ultrasoft, Supersoft, Superhard, Wet, Intermediate) (you might have to do some research to find more info)
3. Better Bot AI
4. Cars from different eras (1950, 1960, 1970, 1980, 1990, 2000, 2010, 2020)
5.Better Acceleration/Braking/Steering physics
Tracks:
1. Imola Circuit
2. Nürburgring Circuit
3. Eifelrennen (Nürburgring Nordschleife)
4. Circuit Zandvoort
5. Miami International Autodrome, Miami Gardens
6. Circuit of the Americas, Austin
7. Baku City Circuit
8. Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya
9. Interlagos Circuit
————————————————————————
It would be great if these things were added, since it would make the game more enjoyable and realistic

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestions!

reviews.review_title: Worth the money, needs more players tho
reviews.review_description:
Great game, unfortunately some people have no special awareness but that comes with any racing game. If I were the creator though I would make this game free so that there will be more players as there isn’t always a lobby to join and the bot racers are too easy. If you make the game free I guarantee you will make more money than you would’ve before as more people will buy the cosmetics.
Over all it is a great game but it could be better like for example if you crash your car would take damage but it is a great game over all and I play it regularly 5 stars 🤩

this game is very good i mean if you wanna formula one game this is the own that you should get and for only $8 this is very very cheap for a game that says good as this the thing that is game struggles with which means i give it four stars is because they updates are very very slow moto x gets a lot of updates but formula x doesn't really get that much but again this game is very very good and i think that this game deserves to be on a featured list
Amazing game thats all there is to say its better than moto x but i think they should add more ways to get xp cause leveling up is slow

I have a blast playing formula X it’s semi realistic, but it certainly is a good game. The tire system is not too bad and the game overall is a lot of fun. There’s also a good number of maps of course I want more but I’m happy with what’s there. Overall highly recommend playing￼.

reviews.review_description: And the accessibility options are terrible and I want a refund

reviews.review_title: One of the best racing games on Quest
reviews.review_description: Very good for the price, nice visuals, Monaco is really well done for the standalone and other tracks are also done well with nice landmarks to see . At the moment the modes are Time Trials, Races vs AI and Multiplayer. I have only played Time Trials which was addictive completing in the weekly challenges/leadersboards and the races against 9 other AI drivers. I heard the AI was poor but doing a race at Monaco which historically is the most difficult for AI they performed very well. I like there is a settings bar for the ai difficulty from 1-100. At the moment I am on about 35 to get a fairly challenging and entertaining race to take part in. The icing on the cake would be a championship mode with tactical pitstops, driver and constructors tables which the game lacks although there is another mode still to come. There are fully functioning pitstops in the game which is immersive to have your pit crew performing their duties while you sit in the car. Very pleased with my purchase.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're so glad you liked it! We'll take your suggestions into account!

reviews.review_description: This game has been super fun since i got it this summer. Highly recommend, It is def worth the 8$

reviews.review_title: Great game with some bugs in the updates
reviews.review_description: This game is a 5/5 without the bugs that come with some of the updates. AI isn’t the best, but still pretty good. (Better the Stroll) Fun multiplayer, with good vibes from the other players. Overall pretty good and fun, but there is some things they have to work on.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We're really working on finding and fixing bugs. Stay tuned. Many of the annoying bugs will be fixed in the next update.

reviews.review_description: All my cars are gone all my levels are gone and i want it fixing i was about to unlock the ferrari and got a new headset when i connected my acc to the new headset it took everything of of me

The game pictures itself as a hyper-realistic racing game with stunning controls and graphics. That's all one big lie. The game has okay graphics (hardly realistic) and your controllers constantly vibrate. Not only does this make your hands feel weird, but it also makes your batteries die quicker. This game would be worth the eight bucks if it actually had good graphics like it pictures, and other small improvements.

developer_response.body:
We are sorry that you did not enjoy the game. However, please note that if you are not satisfied with the vibration, you can disable it in the game settings. There are also many other settings that will help you customize the game to your liking.

If there's anything else you didn't like, please let us know. We'll take your suggestions into account. Thank you.

I’m a racing fan, and this game brings my dreams to life. I just realized it would be sick for there to be a career mode. Like overall, if you’re looking for a racing be game this is it.

Best game I ever got I'm currently trying out for a team and Its going well my only concern is when I race AI and I overtake they just disappear like 5 seconds back and they have no brain only follow the racing line every time I try to overtake I get boxed into the wall on monaco

reviews.review_description: This is amazing game I have only been playing for a week but I already love. When I flick the left joystick up the screen on the steering wheel goes from gray to green. It also makes me accelerate faster but only when under a certain speed. Is this just me or is this a game mechanic. I looked online and couldn’t find anyone mentioning it so just wondering if it’s a glitch on my side or it’s supposed to be there

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thank you for your review. 

This is an ERS system. It is like a power boost for the car’s engine. But you can’t use it all the time. It has a battery, a yellow line on the steering wheel screen

reviews.review_title: Best F1 Racing Game on VR
reviews.review_description: Graphics are good. Many modes and game is very intuitive. Producers of the game are nice and the game has frequent updates. Great game

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support!

reviews.review_description:
I’ve been playing this game for I would say a decent while ( I think almost a year ) and it’s had some interesting changes by the devs but I’ve rather enjoyed my time playing it either by myself or in multiplayer.

The reason I won’t give it 5 Stars and given it 4 instead is due to two main reasons.

1. The devs have been somewhat slow with updates and mechanics in the past

2. When new features do get implemented they tend not to improve them nor quickly when they do 

A warning I will give is the multiplayer isn’t the best if your friend is cross continent or has bad WiFi but you can always find people to race with in the FXRL Discord which is a part of this games community based on bringing both a competitive semi-professional league style racing experience and just casual racing for those who either don’t have the skill or just want to relax.

But seriously note to the devs please don’t give up on Formula X it’s a good game and the only one I’ve found which portrays the formula racing experience in a well done manner.

Amazing game 
I get zoned into it and the ability to add the halo and helmet is a great addition

Edit:
To devs,  no still doesn't work connected with cable. I've opened a ticket on discord if you're able to look at that please.


I'm rewriting this review as the developers have responded previously and it's genuinely transformed my enjoyment. Turning off TCS and ABS, has made all the difference. 

Doyo steering wheel: How do I get it to work? It's connected to my headset but does nothing in game and there's nothing in options to change control method. I've updated my star rating to three and of you can get this wheel working I'll give you another.


Initially I hated the motion controls but now they've clicked. I'd go as far as to say this is the best motion control I've experienced on the Quest 3. I'm addicted to time trial.

Turning off ABS completely changes braking and gives a little tyre squeal. This definitely needs to be louder, more purposeful though.


The graphics are pretty sharp. Cockpit looks great and garage presentation is nice. Tracks are somewhat flat and and lifeless, but if this is the sacrifice to keeping it running smoothly so be it. The addition of a crowd is surely a must though. Just static people would be fine.

Sound design is weak and needs much attention. The engines sound like they came from an eighties DOS game. Give us a piercing, roaring V10 soundtrack. 

 There is no tyre smoke or debris when locking up or running off. 

No spatial sound design. Enemy cars make a faint sound but still very weak. Sound going through tunnels beeds to be greatky increased theres little difference. The gear change thud is again weak.  Nothing has any purpose or excitement about it. This is meant to be F1. Loud, definitive, the sound is a damp squib at best. The music is pretty terrible, but also not required. 

Needs a sfx when hitting rumble stripes. The DRS whine needs to be louder. And at high speed more wind noise.

Your pit boss looks in his fifties, his voice is someone in their thirties, it doesn't tie up. There is no crackle from radio comms like there would by, and nothing happens when you win a race. Put boss should be shouting in your ear: Yes, yes, we'll done, now get us a championship. No crowd cheering when you pass the stands. Every single aspect lacks atmosphere, detail and love. 

This game could, could be incredible but it needs all these sound critiques rectified to give you that important connection to the experience.

However you will still have fun.

Please tell me how to setup the steering pleaaaaaaase!

developer_response.body: Hey, again. Use DOYO with the USB-C Connection to the helmet, bluetooth doesn't work, unfortunately. I'm very glad you liked it! If you have any more questions, come to Discord. I'll try to help.

reviews.review_description: Why is this game not free? And also when you barely move your controller the car spins out and the ai is trash and 8$? Very money hungry and bad game

developer_response.body: We are very sorry that you did not like the game. Try to enable TCS in the game settings, it will make the car more controllable. Also you can check tire wear, if it is enable turn off this. As for AI, we will improve it in the next updates. Also look in the store for similar races for the same price, I think you will be surprised.

reviews.review_title: Game good but it won’t work
reviews.review_description: I love this game but my game will not launch like no matter what devs if you can make update to help with it or give me some advice or add me on meta PLS I want to race my life is nothing without this game PLS🙏

developer_response.body:
Hello! We are very sorry that you are experiencing such a problem. If the problem is still relevant and reinstalling the game does not solve it. Please go to our discord and describe in more detail how exactly this happens. I will not be able to help you without this, since the game works for most players. Thank you! 

https://discord.gg/RDgSMTFH

reviews.review_description:
Updated to 5 star after months of playing. Still Absolutely love this. I've been on racing games since Formula 1 98, and this is seriously impressive. Yes it is a little basic compared console games, but if you want to race in VR this is the game. Blows the other F1 VR app out of the water. I know most of the tracks off by heart and they stay quite true to the layouts and altitudes. The ERS and DRS is really cool. 

I'm not a big person on updates unless really needed so other reviews may cover the life cycle of the game better, I just enjoy getting on a time trial and taking off the hundreds and thousands - yes there could be a little work;

- Add a function to see who's taking mid race (a lot of racist squeaky voiced children on the game. I report on Meta currently and won't download discord for reporting this, should be able to easily see who's doing wrong and kick/report). 
- Penalties for AI's/Online racers causing collisions/driving into you (when you're not at fault).


But, if you love racing, this is for you. Time Trials I'm finding immense pleasure in chopping down my lap times and currently now going for top 10 on the leader boards. Loving the multilayer and have found a great group to race with, just still really happy with this game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed feedback!

The problem with multiplayer may be related to the voice chat. Allow access to the microphone in the privacy settings of the game, this should help. If you have any more questions, visit our discord, we will help.

reviews.review_description: Best f1 game

developer_response.body: Thank you!

reviews.review_description: When I started, I got roasted for being new and it made me kind of sad, but it’s still a fun game when no one‘s being rude w developers for making this game

reviews.review_title: One of my favorite games ever
reviews.review_description: Formulaxs concept is one of the most engaging and exciting I’ve seen in a while. I have been playing sense a little after the multiplayer update and sense then this has been almost the only game I have played. The community is wonderful and very open to beginners. Once you advance to a competitive stage the players are extremely talented. 10/10 game STILL IN PROGRES but I expect great things for the future.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We continue to develop the game. Stay with us, we appreciate it

reviews.review_description: I heard people taking about a “league”that is on this game but I can’t seem to find the discord can you send me the link? Overall great game I recommend!

developer_response.body:
https://discord.gg/7GTjt5UvUZ our Discord
https://discord.gg/ZYMkFmr4ZP the league Discord. I want to mention that the players themselves run the league. We have nothing to do with it.

Thanks for your support!

reviews.review_description: Ive been playing the game for nearly a year and i think its the best any vr f1 game can be in a standalone vr i keep playing it and its still very fun !

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support!

reviews.review_description: Game is absolutely great and as a moderator for MotoX this is absolutely great. And yes it needs a few more updates but apart from that it's the best F1 game on vr with an amazing community

developer_response.body: Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Great game
